description: Comparative corpus evidence module covering multiple historical cases under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice (American Revolution, Napoleon, Lincoln, Hitler): a multi-case stratified corpus with manifest-driven pipeline and cross-case synthesis research site.
maintainerNotes: American Revolution and Napoleon do not yet have corresponding PPW case files; case mapping must be confirmed before their corpus subsets are imported (see PPW #149-#151 and docs/architecture/imported-projects.md). Rights vary by era; pre-1928 texts are generally public domain, Nazi-era translations and apparatus require review. Corpus import scheduled for Milestone 17; no artifacts imported yet as of Milestone 14.
